title: convolvulus × leucanthus
intro: Convolvulus × leucanthus, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Convolvulus sabatius and Convolvulus lineatus, is a flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Convolvulus × leucanthus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
